column1: # Curated probe subset for /vocab level test (vocabulary size estimation, testyourvocab-style).
# Methodology: combined corpus of OpenSubtitles ko_full.txt (688k eojeol+count) and the
#   kowiki-latest-all-titles-in-ns0 dump (~1.6M article titles). Both are morphologically
#   analyzed with kiwipiepy; for ko_full only the first content morpheme of each eojeol is
#   kept and reduced to dictionary form, while every NNG/NNB/VV/VA content morpheme inside
#   each Wikipedia title is counted (count=1 per title). Lemma forms: NNG/NNB → noun;
#   VV/VA/VX → stem+다; noun+XSV/XSA → noun+<suffix>다 where suffix is the literal 하/되
#   emitted by kiwipiepy; XR+XSV/XSA same; MAG/MAJ length≥2 → adverb. NNP (proper nouns)
#   and OOV NNG tokens are dropped — they are overwhelmingly subtitle character names or
#   typos. Counts are summed across sources; the resulting list is re-ranked by total
#   aggregated frequency. Two slices are emitted: ko.probes.tsv (rank ~50 to ko ceiling,
#   Stage 1+2 use) and ko.rare.tsv (rank 15000 to ko ceiling, Stage 3 dense upper-band
#   sampling). Korean per-lang ceiling is set to 45000 — see LANG_CEILING in _curate.py.
